rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core mechanism is “anticipated guilt and guilt-reducing justification” in virtue/vice food choices, which directly overlaps with the cited paper’s central theory on justification effects in hedonic vs. utilitarian choice. The citing note explicitly says it “connects and builds on self-rationing work by specifying guilt and justification as mechanisms,” making this more than an incidental background mention despite only one DOI-level matched reference entry.
